excerpt: I was invited to speak at GTM Daily Office Hours — built a working AI product live using Claude Code and walked through how I approach AI-assisted workflow building. From pharma sales to shipping production AI systems without a traditional coding background.

I built a tool that polls HubSpot every 5 minutes, downloads call recordings, transcribes with Deepgram, extracts BANT with GPT-4o, and pushes insights back to the deal automatically. Here's the full architecture and what I learned building it.
DeepAccount: paste any company URL and your ICP, get back a fit score, buyer personas, key objections, and a cold opener in under 10 seconds. Built it in a weekend. Here's how the pipeline works.
